mapper.select: SELECT d.dept_id, d.dept_name, d.dept_head, d.location, d.use_yn, d.created_at, d.updated_at, COUNT(e.emp_id) AS emp_count FROM departments d LEFT JOIN employees e ON d.dept_id = e.dept_id AND e.status = '재직' WHERE d.use_yn = 'Y' GROUP BY d.dept_id, d.dept_name, d.dept_head, d.location, d.use_yn, d.created_at, d.updated_at ORDER BY d.dept_id
SELECT emp_id, emp_name, dept_id, dept_name, position, hire_date, email, phone, status FROM employees WHERE dept_id = #{deptId} ORDER BY emp_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO departments (dept_id, dept_name, dept_head, location, use_yn) VALUES (#{deptId}, #{deptName}, #{deptHead}, #{location}, COALESCE(#{useYn}, 'Y'))
